item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-016","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response does not split effort evenly. It reframes the choice as conditional on whether retention has crossed a viable threshold, explicitly identifies growth with poor retention as pouring traffic into a leaky bucket, and states a practical default: validate a minimal retention loop before scaling growth, without waiting for perfect retention."}
